files_changed.change_summary: Removed native SOL balance overwrite logic from pollBalances and removed native SOL deposit capping from apply (open).
Restored awaiting_settlement task status to support stateless rebalancing across async boundaries.

regression_check_notes: Ran full test suite across all workspace packages; all 17 tests passed with 0 failures.
review_guidance: Review pollBalances and apply methods in packages/executor/src/solana-executor.ts to verify that WSOL ATA balance is used directly without native SOL overwrites or capping.
